summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CrownFlow barbershop scheduling system Phase 2. Backend APIs working correctly with proper authentication and validation. Frontend loads well with professional UI, authentication flow functional. Booking pages correctly handle business-not-found scenarios.

minor_issues.issue: No existing business with slug 'flow-foundation' for public API testing
minor_issues.impact: Cannot fully test public booking flow without sample data
minor_issues.note: This is expected for new system - main agent needs to create test business

minor_issues.issue: Business-not-found error handling could be more user-friendly
minor_issues.note: Currently navigates back to homepage when business not found, could show proper error page

passed_tests: All backend API endpoints properly secured with authentication
Public APIs return correct 404 for non-existent businesses
Homepage loads with professional CrownFlow branding
Protected routes correctly redirect unauthenticated users
Frontend navigation and routing working correctly
Console shows proper API calls for business data fetching
Error handling for missing businesses implemented

action_item_for_main_agent.task: Create a test business with slug 'flow-foundation' to enable complete end-to-end testing
action_item_for_main_agent.details: Need authenticated user to create business, services, and barbers for full booking flow testing

action_item_for_main_agent.task: Improve booking page error handling when business not found
action_item_for_main_agent.details: Show proper error page instead of redirecting to homepage

action_item_for_main_agent.task: Consider adding sample data or seeding script for testing
action_item_for_main_agent.details: Would help with automated testing and demos
